subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. He hath ever been sanctified above all similitudes and likenesses, and commandeth all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان مقدسا عن الامثال و الاشباه و امر الکل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
